channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Ukraine drones strike Russian oil facility, as Kyiv and Moscow trade blows
item.description: Strikes have seen 13,000 residents without power in Zaporizhzhia as Russia and Ukraine trade drone attacks.

item.title: Voting ongoing in snap elections in Malta, governing party expected to win
item.description: Malta's economy to dominate this year’s election, with rising rents and infrastructure at the forefront of debates.

item.title: Senegal’s World Cup 2026 team preview: Players to watch, group, squad list
item.description: Senegal arrive for their third consecutive World Cup as arguably the best side in Africa - and aim to lift the trophy.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 92 as Trump weighs Iran deal
item.description: Trump weighs next steps on Iran deal as Tehran insists negotiations are continuing and no final agreement exists.

item.title: Satire, social media and India’s Gen Z revolt
item.description: A satirical online movement challenges power and propaganda in India.

item.title: Barcelona sign England winger Anthony Gordon from Newcastle
item.description: Gordon netted 17 goals for Newcastle in all competitions this season, including 10 in 12 Champions League games.

item.title: Rwanda-Russia nuclear deal underscores Africa’s shifting power balance
item.description: Rwanda turns to Russia for nuclear training and research, advancing ambitions in technology, healthcare and diplomacy.

item.title: Frustration in Lebanon as Israel expands invasion
item.description: Israel’s ground invasion of Lebanon has moved deeper into sovereign territory, with troops crossing the Litani river.

item.title: Louisiana lawmakers pass congressional map favouring Republicans
item.description: Louisiana approves new congressional map eliminating a majority-Black district after an April Supreme Court ruling.

item.title: First survivor rescued from flooded cave in Laos
item.description: Divers in Laos have rescued the first of five villagers trapped in a flooded cave for more than a week.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump due to make ‘final determination’ on deal with Tehran
item.description: Israel pushes deeper into Lebanon just days after Israel's prime minister ordered 70 percent of Gaza to be occupied.

item.title: Trump pledges to withdraw from Kennedy Center after court strikes his name
item.description: Judge Christopher Cooper ruled against Trump's bid to add his name to the building and close the theatre for two years.

item.title: ICE agent arrested over shooting of Venezuelan man in US immigration raid
item.description: The charges stem from the January 14 shooting of Julio Cesar Sosa-Celis in Minneapolis during Operation Metro Surge.

item.title: ‘Arbitrary measures’: Lula slams US ‘terror’ designation for Brazil gangs
item.description: Lula warned that labelling Brazil's criminal networks as 'terrorists' could 'undermine' local law enforcement efforts.

item.title: Ebola treatment centre rebuilt after being torched by protesters in DRC
item.description: Workers in eastern DR Congo are rebuilding an Ebola treatment centre that was burned by protesters earlier this month.

item.title: UN: “100% of Gaza” should be for Palestinians
item.description: United Nations spokesperson Stephane Dujarric said “100% of Gaza” should belong to Palestinians.

item.title: Iran denies ceasefire deal with US is “finalised”
item.description: Iranian Foreign Ministry Spokesman Esmail Baghaei says that an agreement with the US “has not been finalised yet."

item.title: How realistic is Trump’s Iran framework?
item.description: Analyst Alex Scheers remains skeptical Tehran will accept Washington’s demands, saying “nothing concrete is in place” ye

item.title: Could Alberta trigger Canada’s Brexit moment?
item.description: Alberta separatists are gaining momentum as Canada faces its biggest unity crisis in decades.

item.title: Polish president threatens to strip Ukraine’s Zelenskyy of top state honour
item.description: Ukrainian leader's move to rename army unit after fighters who killed Poles in WWII causes 'outrage' in Poland.

item.title: Canada sidelined in USMCA renegotiations as domestic economy dips
item.description: Canada strengthens Chinese trade ties, seeking economic diversification amid growing US–Canada trade tensions

item.title: Ex-US Attorney General Pam Bondi testifies in Epstein files probe
item.description: Bondi, who was fired in April, defended the release of Epstein records in a closed-door congressional hearing.

item.title: Netanyahu says Israeli forces have crossed Lebanon’s Litani River
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said Israeli forces had crossed the Litani River in southern Lebanon.

item.title: Israel, Russia among new additions on UN sexual violence ‘blacklist’
item.description: New report says nearly 10,000 cases of conflict-related sexual violence were recorded worldwide last year.

item.title: Trump heads into Situation Room to potentially finalise Iran deal
item.description: Donald Trump says he’s in the Situation Room at the White House to make a “final determination” on a deal with Iran.
